GKlib-METIS
===========

# Available modules


The overview below shows which GKlib-METIS installations are available per HPC-UGent Tier-2 cluster, ordered based on software version (new to old).

To start using GKlib-METIS, load one of these modules using a `module load` command like:

```shell
module load GKlib-METIS/5.1.1-GCC-13.3.0
```

*(This data was automatically generated on {{modules_last_updated}})*
